---
title: '`syncweaver patch mark-status`'
---

Record a lifecycle status tag (e.g. `pending`, `contributed`, `merged`) for a
patch entry in the lockfile, enabling automated workflows to track contribution
state.

## Usage

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver patch mark-status --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```

## Examples

```sh
# Mark a patch as contributed upstream
syncweaver patch mark-status --path code/mypackage --status contributed

# Mark with a specific patch file reference
syncweaver patch mark-status \
  --path code/mypackage \
  --patch patches/mypackage.patch \
  --status merged
```
